message:
feat(panels): enhance beads and alerts panels with richer displays

This commit significantly improves both panel components with better
data presentation, severity grouping, and adaptive height handling.

BeadsPanel Enhancements (beads.go):
- Add "Closed" count to stats row (Ready/InProgress/Blocked/Closed)
- Split display into two sections: "In Progress" and "Ready / Backlog"
- Show assignee for in-progress beads: "bead-123 Title (@agent_name)"
- Add priority badges with color coding:
  - P0: Bold red (critical priority)
  - P1: Yellow (high priority)
  - Default: Overlay color (normal)
- Implement adaptive height calculation:
  - Calculate remaining height after header and stats
  - Split between In Progress and Ready sections
  - Minimum 3 lines per section
- Improve empty state messaging:
  - "No ready items" when available but empty
  - "(Pipeline unavailable)" when bv not installed
- Use ellipsis (…) for truncation instead of "..."

AlertsPanel Enhancements (alerts.go):
- Group alerts by severity (Critical > Warning > Info)
- Add stats row showing counts: "Crit: N  Warn: N  Info: N"
- Improved empty state: "✓ System Healthy" with "No active alerts"
- Implement height-aware rendering:
  - Calculate available lines based on panel height
  - Render critical alerts first (most important)
  - Fill remaining space with warnings, then info
- Use renderList() helper for DRY alert rendering
- Severity-specific icons maintained: ✗ (critical), ⚠ (warning), ℹ (info)
- Use ellipsis (…) for truncation

Visual Improvements:
- Both panels now adapt to available height
- Priority/severity information is immediately visible
- Better visual hierarchy with section headers
- Consistent truncation character (…)
